# ⚠️  Is your WordPress site breaking privacy laws?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-01 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 653

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Did you know your WordPress website might be breaking privacy
laws like GDPR right now, even if you use a cookie banner?

Here's the thing: simply showing a cookie banner doesn't make
your site compliant.

That's because most cookie plugins DO NOT block third-party
scripts before user consent.

This is a direct violation of privacy laws, which could result in
hefty fines of up to €20 million.

But don't panic! I've got a free solution that can fix this
today: WPConsent 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.ut634xWX-KfH3W9pUVsc1wELnv4JFSw17ogRGCEdDlw )


WPConsent is a powerful cookie consent management plugin that
ensures your website meets global privacy standards and avoids
fines.

It gives you everything you need to make your WordPress site
privacy-compliant, including:

* It digs deep to find every single tracker, even the ones hiding
in your favorite plugins.
* It prevents many popular tracking scripts from adding cookies
to your website.
* Build beautiful, brand-matching consent notices that won't make
your visitors run away.
* It takes a privacy-first approach by keeping all data right
where it belongs – on your own server.

In a nutshell, it's the simplest way to ensure your website meets
global privacy standards.

👉 Download WPConsent for FREE Today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.ut634xWX-KfH3W9pUVsc1wELnv4JFSw17ogRGCEdDlw )
 👈

But here's where it gets even better...

For website owners who want complete peace of mind, WPConsent Pro
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4zeT-i3XoW38_5099xiVXeJzCL_pGJD3Qki7U2ftkao ) takes compliance to the next level
with unlimited automatic cookie scanning, advanced geo-targeting,
detailed consent logs, premium support, and much more.

Imagine never having to worry about privacy compliance again. No
more manual checks, no more outdated cookie policies, no more
risk of fines.

All the best,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
